description: Style Note allen solly gives your casual wear wardrobe a sophisticated twist with this collared knee length dress. A waist cinching belt ensures an hourglass silhouette. Add on a pair of pumps and a shiny clutch and you're ready to take any party by storm. Product Details White knee length dress with spread collar, covered full placket with buttons, sleeveless, waistline gathered at back with belt, four pleated patch pockets with flaps and buttons on front- two at chest level, two at hip level and georgette lining Material and Care 80% cotton and 20% linen Machine wash Wash dark colours separately Medium heat iron Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33" and waist 28") is wearing a size M
